plugins.name: dev-workflow

plugins.name: issue-tracing
plugins.description: On-call triage assistant that turns a Grafana or Kibana/ELK URL into a structured Root Cause / Impact / How to Resolve / Unknowns report

plugins.name: eureka-sdd
plugins.description: Spec-driven AI development workflow plugin. Generates structured specs (proposal, design, tasks) from requirements, then dispatches specialized agents to implement, validate, and archive — turning ideas into code with minimal manual intervention.
